title: Minecraft's Scariest Mod
description: This mod adds harmless jump scares to everyone in your game just to troll
body:
![Don't get scared](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39f9ea9f9903d63a77c65c887183976fae08cc5d.png)
## What is this mod?
Now, this is not the classic "Running Monster Chasing You Till You Die" (RMCYTYD) mod. This is a non-destructive horror mod that is just intended to scare you for no reason.
## What does it do?
Touching grass, job applications, and... FEMALES???
Now that's scary.

P.S: If you think the PNG jumpscares are annoying, you can turn them off with /sm active false
